purpose: Project-level module/observable definitions and expected run artifacts

purpose: Machine-readable semantic handoff for agents/tasks

purpose: More complete semantic handoff (extended model semantics)

purpose: Minimal entry instruction for agents

purpose: Safety constraints for agents and standardized output behavior

purpose: Regenerate docs/context_bundle*.json from repo state + claims

purpose: Authoritative module classification and active_modules set

purpose: Explicit scientific claim + evidence pointers (reports + runs)

purpose: List and inspect claim metadata in a MATLAB-friendly table

purpose: Open the newest run folder for an experiment

purpose: Canonical run-root summary/index and output subfolders

purpose: Documented expectations for run metadata and run registries

entry_name: Results Output Spec (run root files and folders)

purpose: Standardize run-root observables.csv schema
notes: Creates observables.csv at run root

purpose: Aggregate observables.csv across runs into one table
notes: Best for cross-run knowledge extraction

purpose: Create missing run_review.json manifests based on reports/legacy heuristics

purpose: Registry of rolling surveys to build/update

purpose: Top-level map of repository zones and the current agent context workflow

purpose: Explains snapshot packaging layout and what content is inside core zips

purpose: Create snapshot_repo.zip for offline agent/human use

purpose: Create smaller snapshot_* zip bundles + copies context bundle JSON
dependencies: PowerShell; output path reachable; results dirs exist

purpose: Deterministic navigation protocol across claim/analysis/run evidence (index-first)
